description_long: This is a rectangular, multi-layered cake featuring a light, airy top layer of whipped cream or mousse, adorned with small decorative chocolate pieces and white chocolate curls. The middle layer appears to be a rich chocolate mousse or ganache, while the base consists of a denser, possibly nutty or sponge cake layer. The cake is finished with piped cream details and a branded chocolate medallion on top, suggesting a patisserie-style dessert. The sides reveal the distinct separation of layers, with visible textures indicating a combination of creamy and slightly crunchy elements. The overall appearance is elegant and refined, suitable for display in a bakery window or at a café.
description: A rectangular, multi-layered cake with whipped cream, chocolate mousse, and decorative chocolate accents. Elegant and patisserie-style with visible layers and piped cream.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered structure: a light cream top, chocolate mousse middle, and dense cake base with decorative toppings.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the piped cream, chocolate medallion, and visible cross-section of all layers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with clear separation of layers and visible chocolate decoration.
description_view_3: End view with a focus on the branded chocolate medallion and piped cream details, showing the cake's height and structure.
